name: Assembly Revision Only setting restricts revisions to Assembly parts only
steps:
Given the 'Part Revisions' global setting is enabled and 'Assembly Revision Only' is set to True
Given a part 'Resistor 10k' exists and is not marked as Assembly
Given a user with part edit permission is logged in
When the user attempts to set a revision code on 'Resistor 10k' via the part edit form
Then the system prevents setting a revision on 'Resistor 10k' because it is not an Assembly part

name: Revision field is hidden on all parts when Part Revisions setting is disabled
steps:
Given the 'Part Revisions' global setting is disabled
Given a user is logged in and on any part detail page
When the user views the part details
Then the 'Revision' field and 'Revision Of' field are not displayed on the part details panel
